Random Name Generator

Get 10 random real names per click from our database of 100,000+ verified human names. Filter by gender and tap any result to see full statistics.

Want only rare names? Use the Unique Name Generator. Looking up specific names? Popularity Checker.

Quick presets

What is a Random Name Generator?

A random name generator picks names at random from a database. The HowManyOfMe generator differs from AI tools in one critical way: every result is a real recorded human name sourced from the US Social Security Administration, UK, and 78 other national birth registries — never an invented string. Get 10 names per click, optionally filtered by gender, with each result linking to its full popularity statistics. Want to check how common your name is? Head to the homepage!

Key Features and Attributes

Real-name database

100,000+ names from official birth registries — never AI-generated.

Gender filter

Male, Female, or Any (includes unisex).

10 results per click

Fresh batch every time you press Generate.

One-click presets

Instant 'all boy / all girl / any' shortcuts.

Direct stats links

Tap any result to view its full popularity page.

Zero signup

No account, no email, unlimited use.

Who Uses This Tool?

Authors and screenwriters

Scenario: Need 10 background character names that feel real.

Result: One click delivers 10 authentic names — no more 'John Smith' fatigue.

Game developers

Scenario: Building an NPC name pool for an RPG town.

Result: Generate batches of 10 until you have a believable population.

Teachers running classroom exercises

Scenario: Need example student names without using real students'.

Result: Random generation avoids favouritism and is endlessly replayable.

Indecisive parents

Scenario: Want unbiased name suggestions to break a creative block.

Result: Random sampling exposes you to names you'd never have searched for.

Worked Examples

Input: "Male preset"

Finding: Returned: Marcus, Henry, Owen, Felix, Theo, Wesley, Damian, Reid, Kai, Ezra

Insight: A spread of classic, modern and trending boy names.

Input: "Female preset"

Finding: Returned: Iris, Maya, Hazel, Stella, Cora, Ada, Nora, Eden, Sloane, Wren

Insight: Mix of vintage revivals and modern favourites.

Input: "Any preset"

Finding: Returned: Quinn, Sage, River, Avery, Rowan, Phoenix, Sky, Blake, Kendall, Ari

Insight: Unisex-leaning names dominate the 'any' pool.

✓ Pros

  • ✓ 100% real recorded names, no AI hallucinations
  • ✓ Instant results, no loading
  • ✓ Free + unlimited
  • ✓ Direct stats links per result
  • ✓ One-click gender presets

✗ Cons

  • ✗ No control over rarity (use Unique Name Generator for that)
  • ✗ Country-specific filtering not yet available
  • ✗ 10 results per click is fixed (more in roadmap)

Frequently Asked Questions

What is a random name generator?▾

A free tool that picks names at random from a real-name database. Unlike AI generators, every result is a real recorded human name from birth registries.

How does the random name generator work?▾

We shuffle a 100,000-name pool filtered by your gender choice, then return 10 unique names per click.

Are the names real?▾

Yes — every name comes from US SSA, UK ONS, or one of 78 other national registries. No invented strings.

Can I get random names by gender?▾

Yes. Filter by Male, Female, or Any (which includes unisex names).

How is this different from AI name generators?▾

AI tools invent novel strings that may not be real names. We sample from verified human-name databases — every result is a name someone actually has.

Can I use random names for fiction characters?▾

Yes — authors, screenwriters and game developers use this constantly for believable cast names.

Is the Random Name Generator free?▾

Yes — unlimited generations, no signup, no email, no paywall.

Does each result link to more info?▾

Yes. Tap any name to see its full popularity, decade trends, meaning and origin.

Can I generate names from a specific country?▾

Country-specific generation is on the roadmap. Today, results are global with English-speaking countries best represented.

How many results per click?▾

10 unique names per generation. Click Generate again for a fresh batch.

Related Tools

Unique Name Generator

Same database, but filtered to rare names only.

Baby Name Browser

Browse alphabetically instead of randomly.

Username Generator

Turn any random name into 8 username variants.

Name Meaning Lookup

Check what your random pick actually means.

Random Name Generator data sourced from U.S. SSA, UK ONS, and 78 additional countries. Last updated: Q1 2025.

Hi, I'm Ziven Borceg. Welcome to howmanyofme.co — your all-in-one platform to discover how many people around the world share your first or last name, explore name popularity trends, and uncover the origins and meaning behind names.
